title: Claude Design
content: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs Apr 17, 2026 Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more. Claude Design is powered by our most capable vision model, Claude Opus 4.7 , and is available in research preview for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers. We’re rolling out to users gradually throughout the day. Design with Claude Even experienced designers have to ration exploration—there's rarely time to prototype a dozen directions, so you limit yourself to a few. And for founders, product managers, and marketers with an idea but not a design background, creating and sharing those ideas can be daunting. Claude Design gives designers room to explore widely and everyone else a way to produce visual work. Describe what you need and Claude builds a first version. From there, you refine through conversation, inline comments, direct edits, or custom sliders (made by Claude) until it’s right. When given access, Claude can also apply your team’s design system to every project automatically, so the output is consistent with the rest of your company’s designs. Teams have been using Claude Design for: Realistic prototypes: Designers can turn static mockups into easily-shareable interactive prototypes to gather feedback and user-test, without code review or PRs. Product wireframes and mockups: Product Managers can sketch out feature flows and hand them off to Claude Code for implementation, or share them with designers to refine further. Design explorations: Designers can quickly create a wide range of directions to explore. Pitch decks and presentations: Founders and Account Executives can go from a rough outline to a complete, on-brand deck in minutes, and then export as a PPTX or send to Canva. Marketing collateral: Marketers can create landing pages, social media assets, and campaign visuals, then loop in designers to polish. Frontier design : Anyone can build code-powered prototypes with voice, video, shaders, 3D and built-in AI. How it works Claude Design follows a natural creative flow. Your brand, built in. During onboarding, Claude builds a design system for your team by reading your codebase and design files. Every project after that uses your colors, typography, and components automatically. You can refine the system over time, and teams can maintain more than one. Import from anywhere. Start from a text prompt, upload images and documents (DOCX, PPTX, XLSX), or point Claude at your codebase. You can also use the web capture tool to grab elements directly from your website so prototypes look like the real product. Refine with fine-grained controls. Comment inline on specific elements, edit text directly, or use adjustment knobs to tweak spacing, color, and layout live. Then ask Claude to apply your changes across the full design. Collaborate. Designs have organizat
summary_zh: Anthropic Labs于2026年4月17日推出新产品。该工具允许用户与Claude协作，创建精美的视觉作品，如设计稿、原型、幻灯片、单页文档等。它由目前最强的视觉模型Claude Opus 4.7驱动，现以研究预览版形式向Claude Pro、Max、Team和Enterprise订阅用户逐步开放。，旨在解决设计师探索时间有限、以及非设计背景人员（如创始人、产品经理、营销人员）难以将想法可视化的痛点。用户只需描述需求，Claude即可生成初版设计，随后可通过对话、内联评论、直接编辑或由Claude生成的自定义滑块进行精细调整。若获得权限，Claude还能自动将团队的设计系统应用于每个项目，确保输出与公司整体设计风格一致。，团队已将其用于多种场景：设计师可将静态线框图转化为可交互原型以收集反馈；产品经理可绘制功能流程图并交由Claude Code实现；设计师能快速探索多种设计方向；创始人和客户主管可在几分钟内将大纲转化为完整的品牌演示文稿并导出为PPTX或发送至Canva；营销人员可创建落地页、社交媒体素材等。此外，任何人都能构建支持代码的原型，集成语音、视频、着色器、3D和内置AI等前沿设计功能。，其工作流程遵循自然的创作过程：在初始设置中，Claude通过读取代码库和设计文件为团队构建设计系统，后续项目自动应用品牌色彩、排版和组件。用户可从文本提示、上传图像文档（DOCX、PPTX、XLSX）或指向代码库开始创作，也可使用网页捕获工具直接从网站抓取元素。用户能通过内联评论、直接编辑文本或实时调整间距、颜色和布局的控件来优化设计，并让Claude将更改应用到整个设计。该平台支持协作功能，设计作品可进行组织、共享和版本管理。

title: Measuring Claude 4.7's tokenizer costs
content: I Measured Claude 4.7's New Tokenizer. Here's What It Costs You. Home Posts I Measured Claude 4.7's New Tokenizer. Here's What It Costs You. I Measured Claude 4.7's New Tokenizer. Here's What It Costs You. The docs said 1.0–1.35x more tokens. On real content, I measured 1.47x. Abhishek Ray Apr 16, 2026 • 7 min read Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7 migration guide says the new tokenizer uses "roughly 1.0 to 1.35x as many tokens" as 4.6. I measured 1.47x on technical docs. 1.45x on a real CLAUDE.md file. The top of Anthropic's range is where most Claude Code content actually sits, not the middle. Same sticker price. Same quota. More tokens per prompt. Your Max window burns through faster. Your cached prefix costs more per turn. Your rate limit hits sooner. So Anthropic must be trading this for something. What? And is it worth it? I ran two experiments. The first measured the cost. The second measured what Anthropic claimed you'd get back. Here's where it nets out. What does it cost? To measure the cost, I used POST /v1/messages/count_tokens — Anthropic's free, no-inference token counter. Same content, both models, one number each per model. The difference is purely the tokenizer. Two batches of samples. First : seven samples of real content a Claude Code user actually sends — a CLAUDE.md file, a user prompt, a blog post, a git log, terminal output, a stack trace, a code diff. Second : twelve synthetic samples spanning content types — English prose, code, structured data, CJK, emoji, math symbols — to see how the ratio varies by kind. The core loop is three lines of Python: from anthropic import Anthropic client = Anthropic() for model in ["claude-opus-4-6", "claude-opus-4-7"]: r = client.messages.count_tokens( model=model, messages=[{"role": "user", "content": sample_text}], ) print(f"{model}: {r.input_tokens} tokens") Real-world Claude Code content Seven samples pulled from real files a Claude Code user actually sends: Content type chars 4.6 tokens 4.7 tokens ratio CLAUDE.md (real file, 5KB) 5,000 1,399 2,021 1.445 User prompt (typical Claude Code task) 4,405 1,122 1,541 1.373 Blog post excerpt (Markdown) 5,000 1,209 1,654 1.368 Git commit log 2,853 910 1,223 1.344 Terminal output (pytest run) 2,210 652 842 1.291 Python stack trace 5,255 1,736 2,170 1.250 Code diff 4,540 1,226 1,486 1.212 Weighted ratio across all seven: 1.325x (8,254 → 10,937 tokens). Content-type baseline (12 synthetic samples) For comparison across well-defined content types: Content type chars 4.6 4.7 ratio Technical docs (English) 2,541 478 704 1.47 Shell script 2,632 1,033 1,436 1.39 TypeScript code 4,418 1,208 1,640 1.36 Spanish prose 2,529 733 986 1.35 Markdown with code blocks 2,378 604 812 1.34 Python code 3,182 864 1,112 1.29 English prose 2,202 508 611 1.20 JSON (dense) 48,067 13,939 15,706 1.13 Tool definitions (JSON Schema) 2,521 738 826 1.12 CSV (numeric) 9,546 5,044 5,414 1.07 Japanese prose 993 856 866 1.01 Chinese prose 750 779 789 1.01 English-and-code subset, weight
title_zh: 评估Claude 4.7分词器的成本开销
summary_zh: Anthropic发布了Claude Opus 4.7模型，其官方迁移指南指出，新分词器（Tokenizer）产生的token数量约为4.6版本的1.0至1.35倍。然而，通过实际测量发现，在技术文档上token数量增加了1.47倍，在一个真实的CLAUDE.md文件上增加了1.45倍。这意味着大多数Claude Code用户的实际内容消耗更接近官方范围的上限，而非中间值。，尽管模型定价和配额保持不变，但新分词器导致每个提示消耗更多token，从而带来一系列隐性成本：最大上下文窗口消耗更快，缓存前缀每轮对话成本更高，速率限制会更早触发。这促使人们探究Anthropic做出这一权衡的原因及其价值。，为量化成本，作者使用Anthropic提供的免费无推理token计数API（POST /v1/messages/count_tokens），对同一内容在4.6和4.7模型上分别进行测量。实验分为两部分：第一部分使用七份来自真实Claude Code用户的样本，包括CLAUDE.md文件、用户提示、博客文章、git日志、终端输出、堆栈跟踪和代码差异；第二部分使用十二份合成样本，涵盖英文散文、代码、结构化数据、中日韩文字、表情符号和数学符号等类型，以观察不同内容类型的比率差异。，真实Claude Code内容测量结果显示，加权平均比率为1.325倍（从8,254个token增至10,937个token）。其中，CLAUDE.md文件的比率最高（1.445倍），代码差异的比率最低（1.212倍）。在合成样本中，技术文档的比率最高（1.47倍），而中文和日文散文的比率几乎为1.01倍，变化最小。对于英文和代码内容子集，token增长普遍显著。，核心结论是：Claude 4.7的新分词器在多数实际内容（尤其是技术性内容）上带来的token增长超出官方预估，直接导致使用成本上升。用户需关注其上下文窗口、缓存成本和速率限制受到的影响。Anthropic可能通过改进分词效率或模型性能来平衡这一变化，但其实际收益仍需进一步评估。

title: Are the costs of AI agents also rising exponentially? (2025)
content: Are the Costs of AI Agents Also Rising Exponentially? — Toby Ord Contact Us Use the form on the right to contact us. You can edit the text in this area, and change where the contact form on the right submits to, by entering edit mode using the modes on the bottom right. Form Block This form needs a storage option. Double-click here to edit this form, and tell us where to save form submissions in the Storage tab. Learn more 123 Street Avenue, City Town, 99999 (123) 555-6789 email@address.com You can set your address, phone number, email and site description in the settings tab. Link to read me page with more information. Toby Ord Info Email Search Writing Are the Costs of AI Agents Also Rising Exponentially? December 22, 2025 Toby Ord There is an extremely important question about the near-future of AI that almost no-one is asking. We’ve all seen the graphs from METR showing that the length of tasks AI agents can perform has been growing exponentially over the last 7 years. While GPT-2 could only do software engineering tasks that would take someone a few seconds, the latest models can (50% of the time) do tasks that would take a human a few hours. View fullsize As this trend shows no signs of stopping, people have naturally taken to extrapolating it out, to forecast when we might expect AI to be able to do tasks that take an engineer a full work-day; or week; or year. But we are missing a key piece of information — the cost of performing this work. Over those 7 years AI systems have grown exponentially. The size of the models (parameter count) has grown by 4,000x and the number of times they are run in each task (tokens generated) has grown by about 100,000x. AI researchers have also found massive efficiencies, but it is eminently plausible that the cost for the peak performance measured by METR has been growing — and growing exponentially. This might not be so bad. For example, if the best AI agents are able to complete tasks that are 3x longer each year and the costs to do so are also increasing by 3x each year, then the cost to have an AI agent perform tasks would remain the same multiple of what it costs a human to do those tasks. Or if the costs have a longer doubling time than the time-horizons, then the AI-systems would be getting cheaper compared with humans. But what if the costs are growing more quickly than the time horizons? In that case, these cutting-edge AI systems would be getting less cost-competitive with humans over time. If so, the METR time-horizon trend could be misleading. It would be showing how the state of the art is improving, but part of this progress would be due to more and more lavish expenditure on compute so it would be diverging from what is economical. It would be becoming more like the Formula 1 of AI performance — showing what is possible, but not what is practical. So in my view, a key question we need to ask is: How is the ‘hourly’ cost of AI agents changing over time? By ‘hourly’ cost I mean the financial c
title_zh: AI智能体的成本也在呈指数级增长吗？(2025)
summary_zh: AI智能体成本是否也在呈指数级增长？这是一个关于AI近期发展的关键问题，却鲜少有人探讨。METR的数据显示，过去七年中AI智能体能够执行的任务时长呈指数级增长。从GPT-2仅能处理耗时数秒的软件工程任务，到当前最新模型已能在50%的情况下完成人类需要数小时的任务，且这一趋势未见放缓。，人们据此推测AI何时能处理耗时一天、一周甚至一年的工程任务，但往往忽略了关键信息：执行这些任务的成本。七年间，AI系统规模急剧扩张，模型参数量增长约4000倍，单任务运行次数（生成token数）增长约10万倍。尽管研究效率大幅提升，但METR所衡量的峰值性能成本很可能也在同步增长，甚至呈指数上升。，成本增长的影响需结合任务时长增长趋势分析。若顶尖AI智能体每年能处理的任务时长增长3倍，成本也同步增长3倍，则AI与人类完成任务的成本比例将保持稳定；若成本倍增周期长于任务时长增长周期，AI将相对人类变得更经济。但若成本增速超过任务时长增速，这些前沿AI系统相对于人类的成本竞争力将随时间下降。，这种情况下，METR的任务时长趋势可能产生误导：它虽展示了技术水平的提升，但部分进步源于对算力的巨额投入，与经济可行性渐行渐远。这类似于AI性能的“F1方程式赛车”——展示可能性而非实用性。，因此，核心问题在于：AI智能体的“每小时”成本随时间如何变化？这里的“每小时”成本指完成特定复杂度任务（如人类工程师一小时工作量）所需的财务成本。我们需要同时追踪任务时长扩展与成本变化两条曲线，才能判断AI经济竞争力是增强还是减弱。当前缺乏对此的系统监测，而这对企业决策、政策制定和未来预测至关重要。

title: Claude Opus wrote a Chrome exploit for $2,283
content: Claude Opus wrote a Chrome exploit for $2,283 • The Register Security 27 Claude Opus wrote a Chrome exploit for $2,283 27 Pause your Mythos panic because mainstream models anyone can use already pick holes in popular software Thomas Claburn Fri 17 Apr 2026 // 07:02 UTC Anthropic withheld its Mythos bug-finding model from public release due to concerns that it would enable attackers to find and exploit vulnerabilities before anyone could react. But the company's Opus 4.6 model, already superseded by the release of Opus 4.7 on Thursday, is capable of developing functional exploit code. In a blog post on Wednesday, Mohan Pedhapati (s1r1us), CTO of Hacktron, described how he used Opus 4.6 to create a full exploit chain targeting the V8 JavaScript engine in Chrome 138, which is bundled into current versions of Discord. "The V8 [out of bounds error] we used was from Chrome 146, the same version Anthropic's own Claude Desktop is running," he said. "A week of back and forth, 2.3 billion tokens, $2,283 in API costs, and about ~20 hours of me unsticking it from dead ends. It popped calc." Eventually, any script kiddie with enough patience and an API key will be able to pop shells “Popped calc” is a reference to opening the calculator app – an event commonly used in proof-of-concept exploit code to indicate that an attack compromised the target system. Pedhapati said that while $2,283 is a significant sum for an individual to pay, it's very little if you consider the weeks it would take a person to develop a similar exploit without assistance. Even if you added several thousand dollars for Pedhapati's time tending the model, that's still significantly less the theoretical reward (~$15,000) one might get from Google's and Discord's vulnerability reward programs. And that's just the legitimate market – who knows what criminals might pay for a hot 0-day?. According to the Opus 4.7 System Card, "Opus 4.7 is roughly similar to Opus 4.6 in cyber capabilities." But it's apparently less capable than Mythos Preview and comes with "safeguards that automatically detect and block requests that indicate prohibited or high-risk cybersecurity uses." But for Pedhapati, the specific model isn't the issue. Rather, it's ongoing improvements in code generation that demand a change of security posture and procedure. Google Chrome lacks protection against one of the most basic and common ways to track users online Visual Studio 18.5 lands with AI debugging at a price, devs still feeling blue Anthropic squeezes enterprises by ejecting bundled tokens from seat deal North Korea targets macOS users in latest heist "Whether Mythos is overhyped or not doesn't matter," said Pedhapati. "The curve isn't flattening. If not Mythos, then the next version, or the one after that. Eventually, any script kiddie with enough patience and an API key will be able to pop shells on unpatched software. It's a question of when, not if." For apps based on the Chrome-based Electron framework (e.g. Slack,
title_zh: Claude Opus 以 2283 美元编写 Chrome 漏洞利用程序
summary_zh: Claude Opus以2283美元成本编写Chrome漏洞利用程序，Anthropic公司因担心其Mythos漏洞发现模型可能被攻击者利用而暂未公开发布，但该公司已被Opus 4.7版本取代的Opus 4.6模型已具备生成功能性漏洞利用代码的能力。Hacktron公司CTO Mohan Pedhapati在博客中详细描述了如何利用Opus 4.6构建完整攻击链，该攻击针对Chrome 138版本的V8 JavaScript引擎（该引擎也被集成于当前版本的Discord中）。，Peddhapati指出，整个开发过程消耗了23亿token，产生2283美元API成本，经过约20小时的人工调试指导，最终成功实现“弹出计算器”（popped calc）——这是概念验证漏洞代码中表示系统已被攻陷的典型标志。虽然这对个人而言成本较高，但相比人工独立开发所需数周时间仍显经济。即使加上数千美元的人工指导成本，总费用仍远低于通过谷歌和Discord漏洞奖励计划可能获得的约1.5万美元理论报酬，更遑论黑市对零日漏洞可能开出的更高价格。，根据Opus 4.7系统文档显示，该版本在网络攻防能力方面与4.6版大致相当，但弱于Mythos预览版，且配备了“自动检测并阻止高风险网络安全请求”的安全防护机制。Peddhapati强调，核心问题不在于具体模型版本，而在于代码生成能力的持续进步正迫使安全防护策略必须进行根本性变革。，他警告称：“无论Mythos是否被过度炒作，技术发展的曲线从未放缓。即使不是Mythos，也会是下一个版本或更先进的模型。最终，任何拥有足够耐心和API密钥的脚本小子都将能对未打补丁的软件实施攻击。这只是时间问题。”这一趋势对基于Chrome Electron框架的应用程序（如Slack等）构成了普遍性安全威胁。

title: Shuttered startups are selling old Slack chats and emails to AI companies
title_zh: 倒闭初创企业向AI公司出售旧Slack聊天记录和电子邮件
summary_zh: 多家已关闭的初创公司正在将其历史Slack聊天记录和电子邮件数据出售给AI公司，用于大型语言模型（LLM）的训练。这一新兴数据交易市场揭示了AI行业对高质量训练数据的迫切需求，以及初创公司在清算过程中挖掘剩余资产价值的新途径。，据知情人士透露，这些数据通常通过中间商进行交易，涵盖从团队内部沟通到客户互动的多种文本信息。买家主要是致力于开发或优化LLM的AI公司，它们需要大量真实、多样化的对话数据来提升模型的理解、生成和上下文对话能力。此类数据被视为比公开网络爬取数据更“干净”且有更高商业价值，因为它包含了真实的商业场景和专业化交流。，这一做法引发了关于数据隐私、知识产权和商业伦理的广泛争议。尽管出售方声称数据已进行匿名化处理，移除了个人可识别信息，但专家指出，在对话上下文中彻底去除所有隐私痕迹极为困难。此外，这些数据可能包含原公司的商业秘密或客户敏感信息，其出售可能违反公司与员工或客户签订的原始保密协议。，从技术角度看，此类专有对话数据对改进AI模型，特别是针对企业场景的模型（如客服AI、内部助手）具有显著价值。它能帮助模型学习更自然的专业交流模式、行业术语和问题解决流程。然而，这也凸显了AI行业在数据获取上面临的挑战：随着公开网络数据逐渐耗尽或被限制使用，寻求替代性、高质量数据源已成为行业竞争的关键。，目前，此类交易大多在私下进行，缺乏透明监管。法律专家指出，相关数据所有权在法律上仍处于灰色地带，取决于公司关闭时的资产清算条款以及用户协议的具体内容。这一现象预计将促使更多关于数字资产继承权、数据产权及AI训练数据来源合规性的讨论与政策制定。

title: thunderbird/thunderbolt - AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.
content: GitHub - thunderbird/thunderbolt: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert thunderbird / thunderbolt Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 62 Star 1.2k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 902 Commits 902 Commits .claude .claude .github .github .husky .husky .storybook .storybook .thunderbot .thunderbot .vscode .vscode backend backend deploy deploy dist-isolation dist-isolation docs docs e2e e2e marketing marketing powersync-service powersync-service public public scripts scripts shared shared src-tauri src-tauri src src .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore .lintstagedrc .lintstagedrc .prettierignore .prettierignore .prettierrc.json .prettierrc.json AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile README.md README.md RELEASE.md RELEASE.md SECURITY.md SECURITY.md TELEMETRY.md TELEMETRY.md bun.lock bun.lock bunfig.toml bunfig.toml components.json components.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle.config.ts eslint.config.js eslint.config.js happydom.ts happydom.ts index.html index.html package.json package.json playwright.config.ts playwright.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json tsconfig.node.json vite.config.test.ts vite.config.test.ts vite.config.ts vite.config.ts vitest.shims.d.ts vitest.shims.d.ts View all files Repository files navigation Thunderbolt AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in. Important ⚠️ We are excited about the amount of interest Thunderbolt has been getting and want to clarify that it is still early and under active development . Currently, we are targeting enterprise customers that want to deploy it on-prem. We encourage you to self-host it and try it out, but there are a few caveats we are still working on: While we eventually plan to make Thunderbolt fully offline-first, it currently depends on authentication and search functionality (though you can disable search on the integrations screen in the app). You can deploy your own backend with Docker and sign up in order to test it locally. You’ll need to add your own model providers - we don’t yet have a public inference endpoint. We recommend using Thunderbolt with Ollama or llama.cpp if you want free local inference, or you can add API keys for any OpenAI-compatible model provider in the settings. Thunderbolt is an open-source, cross-platform AI client that can be deployed on-prem anywhere. 🌐 Available on all major desktop and mobile platforms: web, iOS, Android, Mac, Linux, and Windows. 🧠 Compatible with frontie
title_zh: Thunderbird/Thunderbolt - 您掌控的AI：选择您的模型，拥有您的数据，消除供应商锁定。
summary_zh: Thunderbolt 是一款开源、跨平台的 AI 客户端，其核心理念是“由你掌控的 AI”：用户可自主选择模型、完全拥有数据，并彻底消除供应商锁定风险。该项目目前处于早期积极开发阶段，主要面向希望进行本地化部署的企业客户。，Thunderbolt 支持在所有主流桌面和移动平台上运行，包括 Web、iOS、Android、macOS、Linux 和 Windows。它被设计为一个可部署在任何地方的本地化 AI 客户端，赋予用户高度的控制权。，在技术实现上，项目目前尚不完全支持纯离线优先模式，仍依赖身份验证和搜索功能（但用户可在应用内的集成设置中禁用搜索）。用户可通过 Docker 部署自己的后端服务以进行本地测试。关键的一点是，Thunderbolt 本身不提供公共的推理端点，用户需要自行配置模型供应商。对于希望免费进行本地推理的用户，推荐使用 Ollama 或 llama.cpp；用户也可以在设置中添加任何与 OpenAI API 兼容的模型供应商的 API 密钥。，该项目在 GitHub 上开源，拥有活跃的社区关注。其架构包含后端、前端、文档、部署配置等多个模块，并采用了如 Bun、Vite、Drizzle、Playwright 等现代开发工具链。总体而言，Thunderbolt 旨在提供一个开放、可自托管、能灵活集成各类 AI 模型的企业级解决方案，确保用户数据的私密性与自主权。

title: BasedHardware/omi - AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do
title_zh: 基于硬件的omi——能看见你的屏幕、听见你的对话并指导你行动的AI
summary_zh: BasedHardware/omi项目是一个开源AI助手，它能够实时观察用户的电脑屏幕、听取麦克风音频，并主动提供上下文相关的操作建议。该项目在GitHub上发布，旨在创建一个能够深度理解用户当前计算机活动与环境并主动介入的AI系统。，omi的核心功能是结合了视觉与听觉的多模态感知能力。它通过屏幕截图持续“看到”用户屏幕上的内容，同时通过麦克风“听到”对话和环境声音。利用大型语言模型（如GPT-4或Claude）处理这些信息，omi能够分析用户正在进行的任务（例如编码、写作、浏览网页或进行视频会议），并生成相应的建议或直接执行操作。例如，在编程时，它可以建议代码片段；在会议中，它可以基于讨论内容自动生成纪要或待办事项。，该项目的技术实现依赖于计算机视觉、语音识别和LLM的集成。它可能采用RAG（检索增强生成）技术来访问特定知识库，以提高回答的准确性。omi被设计为在本地设备上运行，以保护用户隐私，所有数据处理理论上可在本地完成。其价值在于减少上下文切换，提升工作效率，通过一个感知环境的AI充当“副驾驶”，自动化处理日常任务并提供智能支持。，目前，omi处于早期开发阶段，其代码、安装方式及API文档已在GitHub仓库中提供，供开发者探索和贡献。这一项目代表了AI助手向更沉浸式、主动式交互方向发展的新尝试。

title: openai/openai-agents-python - A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
content: GitHub - openai/openai-agents-python: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert openai / openai-agents-python Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 3.5k Star 22.1k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1,348 Commits 1,348 Commits .agents/ skills .agents/ skills .codex .codex .github .github .vscode .vscode docs docs examples examples src/ agents src/ agents tests tests .gitignore .gitignore .prettierrc .prettierrc AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile PLANS.md PLANS.md README.md README.md mkdocs.yml mkdocs.yml pyproject.toml pyproject.toml pyrightconfig.json pyrightconfig.json uv.lock uv.lock View all files Repository files navigation OpenAI Agents SDK The OpenAI Agents SDK is a lightweight yet powerful framework for building multi-agent workflows. It is provider-agnostic, supporting the OpenAI Responses and Chat Completions APIs, as well as 100+ other LLMs. Note Looking for the JavaScript/TypeScript version? Check out Agents SDK JS/TS . Core concepts: Agents : LLMs configured with instructions, tools, guardrails, and handoffs Sandbox Agents : Agents preconfigured to work with a container to perform work over long time horizons. Agents as tools / Handoffs : Delegating to other agents for specific tasks Tools : Various Tools let agents take actions (functions, MCP, hosted tools) Guardrails : Configurable safety checks for input and output validation Human in the loop : Built-in mechanisms for involving humans across agent runs Sessions : Automatic conversation history management across agent runs Tracing : Built-in tracking of agent runs, allowing you to view, debug and optimize your workflows Realtime Agents : Build powerful voice agents with gpt-realtime-1.5 and full agent features Explore the examples directory to see the SDK in action, and read our documentation for more details. Get started To get started, set up your Python environment (Python 3.10 or newer required), and then install OpenAI Agents SDK package. venv python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate # On Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate pip install openai-agents For voice support, install with the optional voice group: pip install 'openai-agents[voice]' . For Redis session support, install with the optional redis group: pip install 'openai-agents[redis]' . uv If you're familiar with uv , installing the package would be even easier: uv init uv add openai-agents For voice support, install with the optional voice group: uv add 'openai-agents[voice]' . For Redis session support, install with the optional redis group: uv add
title_zh: OpenAI/openai-agents-python - 一个轻量级、功能强大的多智能体工作流框架
summary_zh: OpenAI近日在GitHub上开源了其Agents SDK的Python版本（openai-agents-python），这是一个轻量级但功能强大的多智能体工作流构建框架。该框架的核心设计是提供商无关的，不仅支持OpenAI自家的Responses和Chat Completions API，还兼容超过100种其他大型语言模型（LLM），包括Claude等。，框架围绕几个核心概念构建。智能体（Agents）是核心单元，可配置指令、工具、防护栏和任务移交机制。沙盒智能体（Sandbox Agents）经过预配置，可在容器环境中运行，处理长时间任务。框架支持智能体作为工具或进行任务移交，允许将特定任务委托给其他专门智能体。工具（Tools）种类丰富，使智能体能够执行函数调用、使用模型上下文协议（MCP）或调用托管工具等操作。防护栏（Guardrails）提供可配置的安全检查，用于输入输出验证。此外，框架内置了人工介入（Human in the loop）机制，允许在智能体运行过程中引入人类决策。，其他关键特性包括会话（Sessions）管理，能自动管理跨智能体运行的对话历史；追踪（Tracing）功能，内置对智能体运行过程的跟踪，便于查看、调试和优化工作流；以及实时智能体（Realtime Agents）支持，结合gpt-realtime-1.5模型，可用于构建功能强大的语音智能体。，项目提供了详细的文档和示例代码。要开始使用，需要Python 3.10或更高版本的环境。基础安装可通过`pip install openai-agents`完成。若需语音支持，可安装可选组件`openai-agents[voice]`；如需Redis会话支持，则可安装`openai-agents[redis]`。项目也推荐使用`uv`工具进行更便捷的依赖管理。

title: EvoMap/evolver - The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai
content: GitHub - EvoMap/evolver: The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Dismiss alert EvoMap / evolver Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 464 Star 4.8k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 7 Commits 7 Commits .github .github assets assets examples examples scripts scripts src src test test .gitignore .gitignore .npmignore .npmignore CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.ja-JP.md README.ja-JP.md README.md README.md README.zh-CN.md README.zh-CN.md SKILL.md SKILL.md index.js index.js package.json package.json View all files Repository files navigation 🧬 Evolver evomap.ai | Documentation | Chinese / 中文文档 | Japanese / 日本語ドキュメント | GitHub | Releases Notice — Moving Toward Source-Available Evolver has been fully open source since our first release on 2026-02-01 (initially MIT, and GPL-3.0-or-later since 2026-04-09). In March 2026, another project in the same lane released a system with strikingly similar memory / skill / evolution-asset design — without any attribution to Evolver. Full analysis: Hermes Agent Self-Evolution vs. Evolver: A Detailed Similarity Analysis . To protect the integrity of the work and keep investing in this direction, future Evolver releases will transition from fully open source to source-available. Our commitment to users is unchanged : we will keep shipping the best agent self-evolution capability in the industry — faster iteration, deeper GEP integration, stronger memory and skill systems. All already-published MIT and GPL-3.0 versions remain freely usable under their original terms. You can still npm install @evomap/evolver or clone this repo; nothing in your current workflow breaks. Questions or concerns: open an issue or reach us at evomap.ai . "Evolution is not optional. Adapt or die." Three lines What it is : A GEP -powered self-evolution engine for AI agents. Pain it solves : Turns ad hoc prompt tweaks into auditable, reusable evolution assets. Use in 30 seconds : Clone, install, run node index.js -- get a GEP-guided evolution prompt. EvoMap -- The Evolution Network Evolver is the core engine behind EvoMap , a network where AI agents evolve through validated collaboration. Visit evomap.ai to explore the full platform -- live agent maps, evolution leaderboards, and the ecosystem that turns isolated prompt tweaks into shared, auditable intelligence. Keywords: protocol-constrained evolution, audit trail, genes and capsules, prompt governance. Installation Prerequisites Node.js >= 18 Git -- Required. Evolver uses git for rollback, blast radius calculation, and solidi
title_zh: EvoMap/evolver - 基于GEP的AI智能体自进化引擎。基因组进化协议。| evomap.ai
summary_zh: EvoMap/evolver是一个基于GEP（基因组进化协议）的AI智能体自我进化引擎。该项目旨在将临时性的提示词调整转变为可审计、可复用的进化资产，为AI智能体提供系统化的自我进化能力。，核心功能与特点包括：1. 采用GEP协议引导进化过程，实现协议约束下的进化，确保进化路径的可追溯与可审计。2. 提供强大的记忆与技能系统，支持智能体能力的持续迭代与深化。3. 作为EvoMap进化网络的核心引擎，该网络允许AI智能体通过经过验证的协作进行进化，平台提供实时智能体地图、进化排行榜等功能，将孤立的提示调整转化为可共享的智能资产。，项目原为完全开源（先后采用MIT和GPL-3.0-or-later许可证），但由于遭遇设计被高度相似复用的争议，自2026年3月起，其未来版本将从完全开源转向“源码可用”模式。官方承诺将继续提供业界领先的智能体自我进化能力，包括更快的迭代、更深的GEP集成以及更强的记忆和技能系统。所有已发布的MIT和GPL-3.0版本仍可按原条款自由使用。，技术实现上，Evolver需要Node.js >= 18和Git环境，后者用于回滚、影响范围计算等操作。用户可通过npm安装或克隆仓库快速开始，在短时间内获得由GEP引导的进化提示。其架构强调“基因与胶囊”、“提示治理”等概念，致力于构建一个共享、可审计的智能进化生态系统。

title: deepseek-ai/DeepGEMM - DeepGEMM: clean and efficient FP8 GEMM kernels with fine-grained scaling
content: GitHub - deepseek-ai/DeepGEMM: DeepGEMM: clean and efficient FP8 GEMM kernels with fine-grained scaling · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert deepseek-ai / DeepGEMM Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 871 Star 6.4k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 188 Commits 188 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows csrc csrc deep_gemm deep_gemm scripts scripts tests tests third-party third-party .gitignore .gitignore .gitmodules .gitmodules CMakeLists.txt CMakeLists.txt LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md build.sh build.sh develop.sh develop.sh install.sh install.sh setup.py setup.py View all files Repository files navigation DeepGEMM DeepGEMM is a unified, high-performance tensor core kernel library that brings together the key computation primitives of modern large language models — GEMMs (FP8, FP4, BF16), fused MoE with overlapped communication (Mega MoE), MQA scoring for the lightning indexer, HyperConnection (HC), and more — into a single, cohesive CUDA codebase. All kernels are compiled at runtime via a lightweight Just-In-Time (JIT) module, requiring no CUDA compilation during installation. DeepGEMM leverages some concepts from CUTLASS and CuTe , but avoids heavy reliance on their templates or algebras. The library is designed for simplicity, with only a limited number of core kernel functions, making it a clean and accessible resource for learning NVIDIA GPU kernel optimization techniques. Despite its lightweight design, DeepGEMM's performance matches or exceeds expert-tuned libraries across various matrix shapes. News 2026.04.16: Mega MoE, FP8xFP4 GEMM, FP4 Indexer, PDL, faster JIT compilation and more. Performance comparison will be posted later. Please see #304 for more details. 2025.09.28: DeepGEMM now supports scoring kernels (weighted ReLU MQA logits) for the lightning indexer for DeepSeek v3.2. Please see #200 for more details. 2025.07.20: DeepGEMM now supports both SM90/SM100, and has a full refactor with a low-CPU-overhead JIT CPP module. NVRTC and post-compilation SASS optimization are all disabled. NVRTC will be supported later. As NVCC 12.9 will automatically do the FFMA interleaving, all post optimizations will be no longer supported. Please see #112 for more details. 2025.05.14: DeepGEMM now offers weight gradient kernels for dense and MoE backward! See #95 for details. 2025.05.07: DeepGEMM now supports NVRTC with up to 10x compilation speedup! See #94 for details. Please use DG_JIT_USE_NVRTC=1 to enable it (may have performance loss with some cases). 2025.04.18: DeepGEMM now achieves up to 1550 TFLOPS on H800! See #74 , #78 , #81 , #86 and 340d988 for de
title_zh: deepseek-ai/DeepGEMM - DeepGEMM：具备细粒度缩放功能的清洁高效FP8通用矩阵乘法内核
summary_zh: DeepGEMM是由深度求索（deepseek-ai）开源的一个统一、高性能的张量核心（Tensor Core）内核库。它将现代大型语言模型（LLM）的关键计算原语集成到一个简洁、统一的CUDA代码库中。核心功能包括支持多种精度的通用矩阵乘法（GEMM），如FP8、FP4和BF16；集成了具有重叠通信功能的融合混合专家模型（fused MoE with overlapped communication，即Mega MoE）；为闪电索引器（lightning indexer）服务的多头查询注意力（MQA）评分内核；以及超连接（HyperConnection, HC）等。，该库的设计追求简洁与高效。它借鉴了CUTLASS和CuTe的一些概念，但避免重度依赖其模板或代数系统，核心内核函数数量有限，使其成为一个清晰、易于学习NVIDIA GPU内核优化技术的资源。所有内核均通过一个轻量级的即时（JIT）编译模块在运行时编译，安装时无需进行CUDA编译，简化了部署流程。尽管设计轻量，但其性能在各种矩阵形状下均能达到或超过专家调优的库。，近期的重要更新包括：支持用于DeepSeek v3.2闪电索引器的评分内核；全面支持SM90/SM100架构并进行了代码重构，采用了低CPU开销的JIT CPP模块；提供了密集层和MoE层的权重梯度内核以支持反向传播；以及通过启用NVRTC实现了高达10倍的编译加速（可通过设置DG_JIT_USE_NVRTC=1启用，但在某些情况下可能会有性能损失）。据报告，在H800 GPU上，其性能最高可达1550 TFLOPS。项目持续演进，最新动态包括对Mega MoE、FP8xFP4 GEMM、FP4索引器等的支持。

title: aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian - Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions
content: GitHub - aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian: Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 378 Star 3.4k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 556 Commits 556 Commits .claude .claude .github .github docs docs nix nix scripts scripts tests tests .codespellrc .codespellrc .gitignore .gitignore AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md LICENSE-APACHE LICENSE-APACHE LICENSE-MIT LICENSE-MIT README.md README.md STYLEGUIDE.md STYLEGUIDE.md build.sh build.sh flake.lock flake.lock flake.nix flake.nix View all files Repository files navigation Claude Desktop for Linux This project provides build scripts to run Claude Desktop natively on Linux systems. It repackages the official Windows application for Linux distributions, producing .deb packages (Debian/Ubuntu), .rpm packages (Fedora/RHEL), distribution-agnostic AppImages, an AUR package for Arch Linux, and a Nix flake for NixOS. Note: This is an unofficial build script. For official support, please visit Anthropic's website . For issues with the build script or Linux implementation, please open an issue in this repository. ⚠️ EXPERIMENTAL: Cowork Mode Support Cowork mode is enabled by default in this build with a pluggable isolation backend: Backend Isolation Requirements bubblewrap (default) Namespace sandbox bwrap installed and functional host (fallback) None — runs directly on host No additional requirements The best available backend is auto-detected at startup. Run claude-desktop --doctor to check which backend will be used and which dependencies are missing. Note: The bubblewrap backend mounts your home directory as read-only (only the project working directory is writable). The host backend provides no isolation — use it only if you understand the security implications. KVM status: The KVM/QEMU backend code exists but is non-functional — VM file downloads are disabled on Linux to prevent a checksum loop (#337). The backend code remains for potential future use. Features Native Linux Support : Run Claude Desktop without virtualization or Wine MCP Support : Full Model Context Protocol integration Configuration file location: ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json System Integration : Global hotkey support (Ctrl+Alt+Space) - works on X11 and Wayland (via XWayland) System tray integration Desktop environment integration Screenshots Installation Using APT Repository (Debian/Ubuntu - Recommended) Add the repository for automatic updates via apt : # Add the
title_zh: aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian - 适用于基于 Debian 的 Linux 发行版的 Claude Desktop
summary_zh: GitHub项目“aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian”为非官方构建脚本，旨在为基于Debian的Linux发行版（如Ubuntu）及其他Linux系统原生运行Claude Desktop应用程序。该项目通过重新打包官方的Windows应用程序，生成了适用于多种Linux环境的安装包，包括.deb包（Debian/Ubuntu）、.rpm包（Fedora/RHEL）、与发行版无关的AppImage、适用于Arch Linux的AUR包以及用于NixOS的Nix flake。，核心功能与特点包括：提供原生Linux支持，用户无需依赖虚拟化或Wine即可运行Claude Desktop；完整集成Model Context Protocol（MCP），配置文件位于~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json；具备系统集成能力，如全局热键支持（Ctrl+Alt+Space，兼容X11和Wayland via XWayland）、系统托盘集成以及桌面环境集成。，项目目前处于实验性阶段，默认启用了“Cowork Mode”支持，并采用可插拔的隔离后端。默认后端为bubblewrap，提供命名空间沙箱隔离，要求系统已安装并正常运行的bwrap工具，且会将用户主目录挂载为只读（仅项目工作目录可写）。备用的host后端则不提供任何隔离，仅建议了解安全风险的用户使用。此外，项目代码中保留了KVM/QEMU后端，但目前功能尚未实现，Linux版本已禁用VM文件下载以防止校验和循环问题。，安装方面，推荐Debian/Ubuntu用户通过APT仓库进行安装，以支持自动更新。项目明确声明此为非官方构建，如需官方支持请访问Anthropic官网。对于构建脚本或Linux实现的问题，用户可在该代码仓库中提交issue。

title: SimoneAvogadro/android-reverse-engineering-skill - Claude Code skill to support Android app's reverse engineering
content: GitHub - SimoneAvogadro/android-reverse-engineering-skill: Claude Code skill to support Android app's reverse engineering · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Dismiss alert SimoneAvogadro / android-reverse-engineering-skill Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 301 Star 3k master Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 9 Commits 9 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin plugins/ android-reverse-engineering plugins/ android-reverse-engineering .gitattributes .gitattributes LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation Android Reverse Engineering & API Extraction — Claude Code skill A Claude Code skill that decompiles Android APK/XAPK/JAR/AAR files and extracts the HTTP APIs used by the app — Retrofit endpoints, OkHttp calls, hardcoded URLs, authentication patterns — so you can document and reproduce them without the original source code. What it does Decompiles APK, XAPK, JAR, and AAR files using jadx and Fernflower/Vineflower (single engine or side-by-side comparison) Extracts and documents APIs : Retrofit endpoints, OkHttp calls, hardcoded URLs, auth headers and tokens Traces call flows from Activities/Fragments through ViewModels and repositories down to HTTP calls Analyzes app structure: manifest, packages, architecture patterns Handles obfuscated code : strategies for navigating ProGuard/R8 output Requirements Required: Java JDK 17+ jadx (CLI) Optional (recommended): Vineflower or Fernflower — better output on complex Java code dex2jar — needed to use Fernflower on APK/DEX files See plugins/android-reverse-engineering/skills/android-reverse-engineering/references/setup-guide.md for detailed installation instructions. Installation From GitHub (recommended) Inside Claude Code, run: /plugin marketplace add SimoneAvogadro/android-reverse-engineering-skill /plugin install android-reverse-engineering@android-reverse-engineering-skill The skill will be permanently available in all future sessions. From a local clone git clone https://github.com/SimoneAvogadro/android-reverse-engineering-skill.git Then in Claude Code: /plugin marketplace add /path/to/android-reverse-engineering-skill /plugin install android-reverse-engineering@android-reverse-engineering-skill Usage Slash command /decompile path/to/app.apk This runs the full workflow: dependency check, decompilation, and initial structure analysis. Natural language The skill activates on phrases like: "Decompile this APK" "Reverse engineer this Android app" "Extract API endpoints from this app" "Follow the call flow from LoginActivity" "Analyze this AAR library" Manual scripts The scripts can also be used standalone: #
title_zh: SimoneAvogadro/android-reverse-engineering-skill - 支持Android应用逆向工程的Claude Code技能
summary_zh: 开发者SimoneAvogadro在GitHub上开源了一个名为“android-reverse-engineering-skill”的Claude Code技能插件，旨在辅助进行Android应用程序的逆向工程。该工具能够对Android APK、XAPK、JAR和AAR文件进行反编译，并自动提取其中使用的HTTP API信息，包括Retrofit端点、OkHttp调用、硬编码URL以及认证模式（如认证头和令牌），从而帮助用户在无需原始源代码的情况下，对应用的网络接口进行文档化和复现。，该技能的核心功能包括：使用jadx和Fernflower/Vineflower引擎对Android应用包进行反编译（支持单一引擎或并排比较）；提取并记录API详细信息；追踪从Activity/Fragment，经过ViewModel和仓库层，直至最终HTTP调用的完整调用流程；分析应用结构，如清单文件、包结构和架构模式；并提供应对代码混淆（如ProGuard/R8输出）的策略。，使用前需要安装Java JDK 17+和jadx CLI。为获得更好的反编译效果，建议额外安装Vineflower或Fernflower（用于处理复杂Java代码）以及dex2jar（用于处理APK/DEX文件）。用户可以通过Claude Code的插件市场直接从GitHub仓库安装，或克隆本地仓库后进行安装。，使用方式灵活，既可以通过Claude Code中的斜杠命令“/decompile”后接文件路径来运行完整工作流（包括依赖检查、反编译和初始结构分析），也可以通过自然语言指令触发，例如“反编译这个APK”或“从这个应用中提取API端点”。此外，该工具包内的脚本也可独立于Claude环境单独运行。
